dialogue_texts: Good morning, sunshine!
Fusana
Please don't talk to me.
Uhh, Fusana? Are you all right? Why are you glowing red all of a sudden?
Fusana
Please leave me alone.
Fusana, I am your partner. What's the reason you are trying to isolate yourself?
Ha ha ha ha!
I have assumed control of your partner, now that I have laid the Order's brand new invention on her.
New invention? What is this 'red stuff' coming out of her?
Your partner has now been properly 'glohmed'.
This means she will isolate from all of humanoids and youkai-borns, and she shall trust the Order!
Trust what!? Now I know why she won't talk with me.
Exactly! She will only talk with us Crimsonite grunts and I will savor your rivalry between you and her!
No! Stop! I guess I'll have to leave... and notify the Hakurei Shrine about this!
Hey! Don't go! I still haven't laid my glohm on you!
Reimu
Hey! What's up? Why do you look so worried?
There's something going around, and it is important you know this, Your Honor.
Reimu
Go on, sir.
The Gensokyo Socialite Order has released some rather nasty new substance that causes those infected to trust the Order!
Reimu
Substance!? What is it called?
If I recall correctly, it is called "glohm".
If you get infected, your heart is shut from all of humanity, including youkai-borns.
And you'll be isolated from society, with the only people you can interact with being Order members!
Reimu
Good lord. Things will be all over for me if I'm shut out.
Exactly! It makes you resent everyone, no matter how you felt before!
Reimu
I will promptly have this sent to the Daily Bunbunmaru so everyone in Gensokyo can be warned about this.
Reimu
In the meantime, I will go out and investigate this.
Reimu
Even if you're a youkai-born, please guard my shrine while I deal with this.
That's good. I'm just praying the glohm doesn't reach Kozankyo.
If you want to know where it started, it all began in the very mansion I live in with my partner near Yumemura!
Reimu
That's where I'll go then!
That said, beware of coming across glohmed individuals.
Their danmaku is more powerful and may spread the substance to you!
